# Serhiy Oplakanets

> Personal website of Serhiy Oplakanets — engineer, co-founder of Rebbix, competitive angler, husband and father of two.

## About

Serhiy Oplakanets is a software engineer with 20+ years of experience. He co-founded Rebbix in 2012, a company that builds dedicated product engineering teams for startups and enterprises. He also co-founded Rove.me, a travel discovery platform. Outside of work he is a husband and a father of two, and competes in sports fishing tournaments.

## Links

- Website: https://oplakanets.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/soplakanets
- Rebbix: https://rebbix.com
- Rove.me: https://rove.me

## Contact

- Email: serhiy@oplakanets.com
